q: Why is distributed monitoring important in modern systems?
opts: To prevent cascading failures and detect issues early

q: What is a cascading failure in distributed systems?
opts: A single failure causing dependent services to fail

q: Which of the following is a primary goal of monitoring?
opts: Provide visibility into system health and failures

q: What does observability primarily help engineers understand?
Which issue is commonly detected through monitoring?
What is the purpose of metrics in a monitoring system?
Which of the following is an example of a monitoring metric?
Why should metric collection have minimal overhead?
What does a monitoring alert typically contain?
opts: A SQL query and a Dockerfile

q: What happens when a metric exceeds a predefined threshold?
In a pull-based monitoring model, who initiates metric collection?
What is an advantage of the pull monitoring strategy?
In a push-based monitoring model, what happens?
When is the push model especially useful?
opts: When firewalls block incoming monitoring requests

q: What type of database is commonly used to store monitoring metrics over time?
Why are time series databases useful in monitoring?
opts: They store metrics chronologically for trend analysis

q: What is code instrumentation in monitoring?
opts: Embedding code to capture custom metrics

q: Which type of monitoring error is usually represented by HTTP 5xx codes?
Which type of monitoring error is usually represented by HTTP 4xx codes?
Why can some client-side errors be invisible to backend services?
opts: The request never reaches the server

q: What is one major consequence of downtime in large-scale systems?
Why is manual debugging difficult in modern distributed systems?
opts: There are too many globally distributed servers
Operating systems no longer support debugging

q: What is the role of logging in monitoring?
opts: Recording system events for troubleshooting and analysis

q: Which operating system metric is commonly monitored?
What does network latency measure?
Why are alerts important in distributed monitoring?
opts: They notify operators when issues occur

q: What is a retry storm in distributed systems?
opts: A sudden increase in repeated requests causing congestion

q: What is the primary purpose of monitoring dashboards?
opts: To visualize system health and trends

q: Why must monitoring systems support historical analysis?
opts: To identify trends and recurring issues

q: What is one benefit of automated monitoring in large infrastructures?
opts: It reduces operational costs and improves scalability
It removes the need for servers
